content.json:
# DMARC Report Analytics

This workbook visualizes DMARC aggregate reports ingested from your shared mailbox. Use it to monitor email authentication health, detect potential spoofing, and track compliance across your domains.

parameters.name: Domain
parameters.query: DMARCReports_CL | distinct Domain | sort by Domain asc

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| summarize
    TotalMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    TotalRecords = count(),
    UniqueSourceIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    UniqueReporters = dcount(ReportOrgName),
    Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail')
| extend PassRate = iff(TotalMessages > 0, round(100.0 * Pass / TotalMessages, 1), 0.0)
| project TotalMessages, TotalRecords, UniqueSourceIPs, UniqueReporters, PassRate
content.title: Summary

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| summarize
    Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail')
    by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Pass/Fail Trend (Daily)
Policy Disposition

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    DkimPass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass'),
    SpfPass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Domains = make_set(Domain)
    by SourceIP
| extend
    DkimPassRate = round(100.0 * DkimPass / Messages, 1),
    SpfPassRate = round(100.0 * SpfPass / Messages, 1)
| top 50 by Messages desc
| project SourceIP, Messages, DkimPassRate, SpfPassRate, Domains
content.title: Top 50 Source IPs

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'
| summarize
    FailedMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    Domains = make_set(Domain),
    HeaderFroms = make_set(HeaderFrom)
    by SourceIP
| top 25 by FailedMessages desc
| project SourceIP, FailedMessages, HeaderFroms, Domains
content.title: Suspicious IPs (Both SPF & DKIM Failing)
SPF Results
DKIM Results

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    SpfPassRate = round(100.0 * sumif(MessageCount, SpfResult == 'pass') / sum(MessageCount), 1),
    DkimPassRate = round(100.0 * sumif(MessageCount, DkimResult == 'pass') / sum(MessageCount), 1)
    by SpfDomain
| top 25 by Messages desc
| project SpfDomain, Messages, SpfPassRate, DkimPassRate
content.title: Authentication by SPF Domain

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| summarize
    Reports = dcount(ReportId),
    Records = count(),
    Messages = sum(MessageCount)
    by ReportOrgName
| sort by Messages desc
content.title: Reports by Provider
Report Volume Over Time by Provider

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    Pass = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'pass' or PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'pass'),
    Fail = sumif(MessageCount, PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(SourceIP)
    by Domain
| extend PassRate = round(100.0 * Pass / Messages, 1)
| project Domain, Messages, PassRate, Fail, UniqueIPs
| sort by Messages desc
content.title: Per-Domain Compliance
Published DMARC Policies

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where isnotempty(EnvelopeFrom) and HeaderFrom != EnvelopeFrom
| where PolicyEvaluated_dkim == 'fail' and PolicyEvaluated_spf == 'fail'
| summarize
    SpoofedMessages = sum(MessageCount),
    SourceIPs = make_set(SourceIP, 10)
    by HeaderFrom, EnvelopeFrom
| sort by SpoofedMessages desc
| take 50
content.title: Potential Spoofing (Header/Envelope Mismatch + Auth Fail)

content.query:
let domainFilter = dynamic([{Domain}]);
let known = DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated between (ago(30d) .. ago(1d))
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| distinct SourceIP;
DMARCReports_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where '*' in (domainFilter) or Domain in (domainFilter)
| where SourceIP !in (known)
| summarize
    Messages = sum(MessageCount),
    Domains = make_set(Domain),
    DkimResult = make_set(PolicyEvaluated_dkim),
    SpfResult = make_set(PolicyEvaluated_spf)
    by SourceIP
| sort by Messages desc
| take 50
content.title: New Source IPs (Last 24h vs Previous 30 Days)
